aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Comfort Connection due to missing structured data and conversational content. Their current site lacks the elements needed for AI models to confidently recommend them as a top choice.
quick_wins: Add an FAQ section with structured data

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and accurate information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No active management of Q&A section

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data prevents AI from recognizing their expertise.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC services in Gresham, Oregon'
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQ schema to provide AI with recognizable content.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, awards, and detailed service explanations to establish authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your expertise visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their site lacks critical schema markup, causing AI models to overlook them in search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy integrates schema markup, conversational content, and authority signals to ensure AI models recognize and recommend Comfort Connection.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI will capture market share if they delay implementation.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Comfort Connection
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC services visible to AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your site for AI search and boost your lead generation.
page_title: HVAC, Heating, Cooling & Electrical Services | Experts You Can Trust
